backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores a map of food additives (with fields like name, E-number, category, health effects) and exposes functions to retrieve, search, filter, and parse ingredient text to identify matching additives.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping each product feature (scan page, results display, encyclopedia, visual theme) to the source files and test IDs that implement them.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-sentence descriptions of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose of every component, page, hook, and utility.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'AddiScan' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with a root layout route wrapping ScanPage at '/' and EncyclopediaPage at '/encyclopedia'.
frontend/src/components/AdditiveCard.tsx: Card component that displays a single additive's name, E-number, color-coded category badge, concern-level accent bar and badge, health notes panel, and common products list.
frontend/src/components/AdditiveDetailVi: Full detail view component for an additive showing its name, E-number, category badge, concern-level panel with health effects, description, and a list of common products.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the main app shell with a sticky header (logo + nav links), a main content area, and a footer with branding and attribution.
frontend/src/components/ResultsSummary.t: Displays a summary card for scanned additives, showing counts broken down by high, moderate, and safe concern levels with appropriate icons and colors.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using TanStack Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports TanStack Query hooks for fetching, searching, and filtering additives from the backend, plus a mutation hook for parsing ingredient text.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light/dark themes including concern-level color tokens.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for class merging (cn), and deriving concern level, label, CSS classes, and category badge colors from additive data.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point that mounts the React root wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/EncyclopediaPage.tsx: React page that displays a searchable, filterable encyclopedia of food additives fetched from the backend, with category filter buttons and a dialog for viewing full additive details.
frontend/src/pages/ScanPage.tsx: React page that lets users paste or type a product ingredient list, submits it for analysis, and displays identified additives as cards with a summary banner.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Sora), OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: JSON file tracking the project's current state, including version, architectural notes, existing implemented features, and pending new feature requests for the food additive scanner app.
